task_completion.description: Set the main chassis mass to 45.5 kg
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or field editor, the 'mass' field under the Physics node of the SEGWAY_ROBOT is set to 45.5.

task_completion.description: Set the center of mass to 0 0 0.15
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or field editor, the 'centerOfMass' field under the Physics node of the SEGWAY_ROBOT is set to 0 0 0.15.

task_completion.description: Update the left_encoder and right_encoder resolution to 0.001534
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, the 'resolution' field for both the left_encoder and right_encoder nodes is set to 0.001534.
In the Webots scene tree, the 'noise' field for the pitch_gyro node is set to 0.005.
A 'Save World As' dialog in Webots showing the file being saved to /home/ga/Desktop/segway_calibrated.wbt, or the Webots window title updated to show 'segway_calibrated.wbt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to modify the robot properties
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots application open and the scene tree being actively navigated and edited.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the Webots interface by directly editing the .wbt file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the .wbt file being edited in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent used the 'Save World As' feature in Webots to save the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save World As' dialog in Webots or the updated window title, rather than just a terminal command creating a dummy file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected mass is 45.5 kg, and the center of mass is [0, 0, 0.15]. The left and right encoder resolution must be 0.001534, and the pitch_gyro noise must be 0.005. The robot is named 'SEGWAY_ROBOT'. The final calibrated world must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/segway_calibrated.wbt.
